subject:
RE:[CASE 12234263722] SA - Restricted Products - Appeal - ASIN:
 B0GCJY4D3N
body_preview:
Hello,
We received your submission and after careful review we have determined that your ASINs do not meet the criteria for reinstatement.
Why did this happen?
Your listings do not meet our standards. Refer to the following details:
ASIN: B0GCJY4D3N
Title: Crifeton Magnetic Building Blocks 220
This product has been identified as containing aggregate masses of small and powerful individual rare earth magnets. Due to a product recall of the rapid alert system of the EU (RAPEX), Amazon policy prohibits the sale and listing of these types of products.
Thank you for flagging asins (B0FB9MPZMZ,B0FBGHLBCK,B0DQ56DF7Q,B0CN95SQ6J), we have reach out to concern department to handle.
You can access the previous communication sent to you in regards to this matter via the "Performance notifications" page in the "Performance" section of Seller Central:
https://sellercentral.amazon.sa/performance/notifications
We’re here to help
For information on our policies, you can go to the following pages:
-- "Restricted products":
https://sellercentral.amazon.sa/gp/help/201743940?referral=A262YZ69IPGLKF_A2G9FIS6VFDCLW&referral=A3Q9SELOQ79HDN_A2G9FIS6VFDCLW
-- "Restricted Products FAQ":
https://sellercentral

From: xiangyuexingeu@yeah.net
Sent: Mar 17, 2026 15:29:27
To: pars-rp-core-sellerappeals@amazon.sa
Subject: SA - Restricted Products - Appeal - ASIN: B0GCJY4D3N
ASIN: B0GCJY4D3N
SKU: XYX-DE-WJJM-1227-006
Submission type: dispute
申诉理由(必须)
Hello Amazon Support Team，
This is a misjudgment. Please see page 8 of the test report; the magnetic flux is 2.169 kG² mm², far less than 50 kG² mm². I request the restoration of the ASIN.
We believe that the listings ASIN: B0GCJY4D3N should not fall under the restriction because they are not  "a small, high-powered magnet or magnet set." We have carefully read and analyzed detailed information about this restriction on the link you provided: https://sellercentral.amazon.de/gp/help/external/help.html?itemID＝200164570&language＝en_US&ref＝efph_200164570_cont_200164330&referral＝A1XQD3T79QG5LO_A2F33MTVMGNJG7
In the "Examples of Prohibited Listings," there is an entry for "a small, high-powered magnet or magnet set."  This is a misjudgment. Please see page 8 of the test report; the magnetic flux is 2.169 kG² mm², far less than 50 kG² mm². I request the restoration of the ASIN.
Clearly, this product is a toy marketed to children, as described in our title and images. the listings ASIN: B0GCJY4D3N is a toy for children above 3 years old; it is categorized as magnetic toys marketed to children. Its product images feature children playing with these building blocks to stack various shapes and scenes.
You might think this product falls under  "a small, high-powered magnet or magnet set." Actually, this product is not individual magnets. All blocks are made of ABS plastic with vivid images printed on six sides. They are lightweight and easy to hold and stack. Kids can have fun by stacking them as they imagine and creatively design their dream builds. Each block contains only a very small magnet to help make children＇s building structures relatively stable. The magnetic force is weak so that kids can easily take apart and rebuild their creations. Therefore, in essence, the product ASIN: B0GCJY4D3N is not novelty magnets or novelty magnet sets. They are building block toys for kids designed to promote children＇s construction skills, hand-eye coordination, patience and concentration, creative thinking, and imagination. The package comes with a small paper featuring some example buildings to inspire kids.
There are also many similar types of magnetic building blocks available on Amazon.com.au, such as B0FB9MPZMZ, B0FBGHLBCK, B0DQ56DF7Q, and B0CN95SQ6J. Like these products, the listing ASIN: B0GCJY4D3N also falls under the category of Toy Building Sets. And these products are being sold normally at present.
We are a professional Amazon seller specializing in children＇s toys. We have always adhered to Amazon platform rules and provided safe high-quality products to customers.
Attached are CE TEST REPORT of the product ASIN: B0GCJY4D3N. We would be most grateful if you carefully review these information and reinstate the listings ASIN: B0GCJY4D3Nfor sale.
Have a nice Day.
附件
📎 SFT260203107798-01E test report.pdf

subject: RE:[CASE 12228008522] 【需要采取行动】 - 波兰和爱尔兰的增值税合规支持
body_preview:
亲爱的卖家，
这是关于我们爱尔兰条款与条件重要更新的重要通知。
重要更正： 我们之前曾告知任何税务顾问都可用于爱尔兰增值税注册。这是一个错误。根据我们条款与条件的更新，现在只有以下税务顾问被接受用于爱尔兰增值税报销计划：
•AVASK
•J&P Accountants
•Taxually
•Expandly
•EURep
•EVatmaster
•VATAi
•Amber
如需了解更多信息，请阅读条款与条件：m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/EU_COMPLIANCE_TEAM/IE_VAT_Terms_and_Conditions.pdf
添加您的税务信息
如需添加税务信息，请访问税务设置：sellercentral.amazon.com/tax/consolidatedRegistrations
**为什么需要增值税注册？**
欧盟税法要求使用FBA的卖家在库存存储的国家/地区注册增值税。亚马逊验证税务信息以遵守税务机关要求，并确保增值税准确应用于您的销售。
了解更多关于欧洲增值税注册要求的信息：sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/GTQ23HPXBQK563WS
如有疑问，请通过您的案例日志联系我们：sellercentral.amazon.com/cu/case-lobby?ref_=xx_case_dnav_xx
如有疑问，请扫码加入亚马逊卖家合规群：
https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/mass_wecom_jm.jpg
Amazon Global Selling Seller Compliance Team

From: xiangyuexingeu@yeah.net
Sent: Mar 17, 2026 15:41:38
To: pars-rp-core-sellerappeals@amazon.ae
Subject: AE - Restricted Products - Appeal - ASIN: B0F74J7N8D
ASIN: B0F74J7N8D
SKU: XYX-KSA-WJJM-1113-04
Submission type: dispute
申诉理由(必须)
Hello Amazon Support Team，
This is a misjudgment. Please see page 8 of the test report; the magnetic flux is 2.169 kG² mm², far less than 50 kG² mm². I request the restoration of the ASIN.
We believe that the listings ASIN: B0F74J7N8D should not fall under the restriction because they are not  "a small, high-powered magnet or magnet set." We have carefully read and analyzed detailed information about this restriction on the link you provided: https://sellercentral.amazon.de/gp/help/external/help.html?itemID＝200164570&language＝en_US&ref＝efph_200164570_cont_200164330&referral＝A1XQD3T79QG5LO_A2F33MTVMGNJG7
In the "Examples of Prohibited Listings," there is an entry for "a small, high-powered magnet or magnet set."  This is a misjudgment. Please see page 8 of the test report; the magnetic flux is 2.169 kG² mm², far less than 50 kG² mm². I request the restoration of the ASIN.
Clearly, this product is a toy marketed to children, as described in our title and images. the listings ASIN: B0F74J7N8D is a toy for children above 3 years old; it is categorized as magnetic toys marketed to children. Its product images feature children playing with these building blocks to stack various shapes and scenes.
You might think this product falls under  "a small, high-powered magnet or magnet set." Actually, this product is not individual magnets. All blocks are made of ABS plastic with vivid images printed on six sides. They are lightweight and easy to hold and stack. Kids can have fun by stacking them as they imagine and creatively design their dream builds. Each block contains only a very small magnet to help make children＇s building structures relatively stable. The magnetic force is weak so that kids can easily take apart and rebuild their creations. Therefore, in essence, the product ASIN: B0F74J7N8D is not novelty magnets or novelty magnet sets. They are building block toys for kids designed to promote children＇s construction skills, hand-eye coordination, patience and concentration, creative thinking, and imagination. The package comes with a small paper featuring some example buildings to inspire kids.
There are also many similar types of magnetic building blocks available on Amazon.com.au, such as B0FB9MPZMZ, B0FBGHLBCK, B0DQ56DF7Q, and B0CN95SQ6J. Like these products, the listing ASIN: B0F74J7N8D also falls under the category of Toy Building Sets. And these products are being sold normally at present.
We are a professional Amazon seller specializing in children＇s toys. We have always adhered to Amazon platform rules and provided safe high-quality products to customers.
Attached are CE TEST REPORT of the product ASIN: B0F74J7N8D . We would be most grateful if you carefully review these information and reinstate the listings ASIN: B0F74J7N8D sale.
Have a nice Day.
附件
📎 SFT260203107798-01E test report.pdf

subject: Seller News: March 2026
body_preview:
Amazon Services
 96
 Stay informed about selling on Amazon.
 Our Seller Newsletter provides the most important policy, tool and programme updates from the past month.
 Introducing a new, AI-powered workspace
 You now have access to a dynamic canvas experience in Seller Central, where you can visualise data and key insights, explore scenarios and take critical actions to grow your business. This integrated, AI-native workspace combines chat and visual elements to provide highly personalised and actionable insights. Read more .
 Upload Images now provides faster uploads and more flexibility
 We’ve enhanced the image upload process in Upload Images to make managing images for your product catalogue faster and more flexible. Read more .
 Save and track product research with Product Opportunity Explorer
 Product Opportunity Explorer now includes a feature that helps you save and organise your research. You can identify profitable opportunities with low competition and save those promising product niches and ASINs with a single click. Read more .
 Account health tips for multiple selling accounts
 Our multiple-accounts policy allows you to operate one account per region unless you have a

subject:
Reduce Returns & Boost Customer Satisfaction - Enrol in Amazon
 Product Support
body_preview:
96
 Enrol now into Amazon Product Support !
 Hello,
 Greetings from Amazon Product Support.
 Every product returned costs time, money, and customer trust. That’s why Amazon offers Product Support, a suite of post-purchase solutions that help customers solve problems quickly and keep products in use. In 2025, approximately 50% of customers who engaged with Product Support did not return their product. *
 Enroll now and learn more about Amazon Product Support
 Here’s how you can reduce returns and help customers:
 • Manufacturer Support - A customer has a question about your product? They can contact your experts directly. In 2025, approximately 64% of customers who contacted support through Manufacturer Support did not return their product. * Available in the U.S., Canada, U.K., Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Belgium, Sweden, Poland, and the Netherlands.
 • Brand Integration - Call & Chat - A customer runs into a setup issue and wants instant help? Provide live calls or chat support. In 2025, approximately 58% of customers who contacted support through Brand Integration - Call & Chat did not return the product. * Available in the U.S., Canada, U.K., Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Be
body_full:
96
 Enrol now into Amazon Product Support !
 Hello,
 Greetings from Amazon Product Support.
 Every product returned costs time, money, and customer trust. That’s why Amazon offers Product Support, a suite of post-purchase solutions that help customers solve problems quickly and keep products in use. In 2025, approximately 50% of customers who engaged with Product Support did not return their product. *
 Enroll now and learn more about Amazon Product Support
 Here’s how you can reduce returns and help customers:
 • Manufacturer Support - A customer has a question about your product? They can contact your experts directly. In 2025, approximately 64% of customers who contacted support through Manufacturer Support did not return their product. * Available in the U.S., Canada, U.K., Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Belgium, Sweden, Poland, and the Netherlands.
 • Brand Integration - Call & Chat - A customer runs into a setup issue and wants instant help? Provide live calls or chat support. In 2025, approximately 58% of customers who contacted support through Brand Integration - Call & Chat did not return the product. * Available in the U.S., Canada, U.K., Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Belgium, Sweden, Poland, and the Netherlands.
 • Self-Help Content - A customer can’t figure out how to use a feature? Upload step-by-step guides or manuals to Amazon’s AI assistant Rufus, letting them troubleshoot themselves. In 2025, approximately 48% of customers who engaged with self-help content did not return their product. * Available in the U.S., Canada, U.K., Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Belgium, Sweden, Poland, Turkey and the Netherlands.
 • Self-Help Videos - Customers prefer watching over reading? Provide short instructional videos for common issues. In 2025, approximately 41% of returns among customers who viewed support videos were reduced through this feature. Available in the U.S., Canada, U.K., Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Belgium, Sweden, Poland, Turkey and the Netherlands.
 • Replacement Parts - A part breaks or goes missing? Instead of returning the full product, send only the replacement part. In 2025, approximately 64% of customers who received replacement parts did not return their product. * Available in the U.S., Canada, U.K., Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Belgium, Sweden, Poland, and the Netherlands.
 * Disclaimer: Prevented returns rates are based on historical program performance data. Individual prevented return rates may vary.
 Please take a moment to share your feedback - your input will help us improve your experience with the Product Support program! Take Survey
 The Amazon Product Support Team
 Report an issue with this email
 If you have any questions visit: Seller Central
 To change your email preferences visit: Notification Preferences
 We hope you found this message to be useful. However, if you'd rather not receive future e-mails of this sort from Amazon.com, please opt-out here.
 Copyright 2026 Amazon, Inc, or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
 Amazon.com, 410 Terry Avenue North, Seattle, WA 98109-5210
 SPC-USAmazon-1442561456243212

subject: Important: Serial numbers required for certain items
body_preview:
Hello from Amazon Seller Services,
The products listed below have been enrolled in the Transparency program by the brand owner. This means that the product is manufactured with a serial number. The serial number can be either a 2D Transparency branded barcode (these are 26 characters long and include a "T" logo) or a 1D or 2D serial number barcode (these are between 7 and 20 characters long and may include the pre-fix "SN").
To ensure product authenticity for your customers, we will require that these products have a Transparency barcode or serial number barcode affixed to the outer packaging of each individual unit of the product in order to be accepted by Amazon.
Below is the list of ASINs that will require a Transparency barcode or serial number barcode from the manufacturer or brand.
ASIN
Title
Target Inbound Date
B0GCDSCPN1
MagnetischeBausteine
4/14/2026
Amazon scans these barcode labels to verify the authenticity of the products. Your customers also can scan your Transparency barcode with the Transparency mobile app to confirm the item is not a counterfeit.
Please contact the respective Brand or your distributor on any further information on the availability of the products w
body_full:
Hello from Amazon Seller Services,
The products listed below have been enrolled in the Transparency program by the brand owner. This means that the product is manufactured with a serial number. The serial number can be either a 2D Transparency branded barcode (these are 26 characters long and include a "T" logo) or a 1D or 2D serial number barcode (these are between 7 and 20 characters long and may include the pre-fix "SN").
To ensure product authenticity for your customers, we will require that these products have a Transparency barcode or serial number barcode affixed to the outer packaging of each individual unit of the product in order to be accepted by Amazon.
Below is the list of ASINs that will require a Transparency barcode or serial number barcode from the manufacturer or brand.
ASIN
Title
Target Inbound Date
B0GCDSCPN1
MagnetischeBausteine
4/14/2026
Amazon scans these barcode labels to verify the authenticity of the products. Your customers also can scan your Transparency barcode with the Transparency mobile app to confirm the item is not a counterfeit.
Please contact the respective Brand or your distributor on any further information on the availability of the products with these barcodes.
(a) If units on the list are fulfilled through Amazon fulfillment center and are without a valid Transparency barcode or serial number barcode , they cannot be sold and will be marked as "unfulfillable" in Seller Central. You can submit a removal order to have these units returned to you or have Amazon dispose them on your behalf.
(b) If you will be fulfilling customer orders for Transparency-enabled products, you must upload Transparency codes or serial number barcodes for these products using tools in Seller Central.
To learn more about the barcode requirements, go to Transparency serial number barcode requirements in seller central. Refer store specific links here: US<https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/202008510>, UK<https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/202008510>, JP<https://sellercentral.amazon.co.jp/gp/help/202008510>, AU<https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/help/202008510>, IN<https://sellercentral.amazon.in/gp/help/202008510>, FR<https://sellercentral.amazon.fr/gp/help/202008510>, ES<https://sellercentral.amazon.es/gp/help/202008510>, IT<https://sellercentral.amazon.it/gp/help/202008510>, DE<https://sellercentral.amazon.de/gp/help/202008510>, CA<https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/gp/help/202008510>.
To provide any feedback, send an email to feedback-transparency@amazon.com<mailto:feedback-transparency@amazon.com> though we are unable to respond to questions sent to this email address.
For questions, contact Seller Support at https://sellercentral.amazon.com/hz/contact-us.<https://sellercentral.amazon.com/hz/contact-us>
Thank you for selling on Amazon.
Sincerely,
The Amazon Seller Services team
Note: Please do not reply back to this email as this is an unmonitored email box, please reach out to your Account Manager or transparency-support@amazon.com for further assistance.
